items.title: Russia Threatened to Halt Syrian Oil Operations if Assad Regime Didn’t Pay Debt
items.summary: Leaked meeting minutes show Russia’s deputy defense minister leaning on Syria to pay a $37-million bill for keeping oil flowing. Months after that meeting, the regime of Bashar al-Assad fell to a rebel coalition. Syria’s new government has continued to negotiate with Russia over its total debt of at least $1.2 billion.
